basic_details.job_title: Army Public School Dhrangadhra Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline for TGT and Nursing Assistant Posts
basic_details.short_information: Army Public School Dhrangadhra TGT (Science) and Nursing Assistant Notification 2026 has been released on the official website https://www.apsdhg.com. A total of 2 vacancies have been announced through the Army Public School Dhrangadhra Recruitment 2026.

qualification.education_qualification: Post Graduate/ Graduate with B. Ed and min 50% Marks, GNM according to CBSE Norms
qualification.details: TGT (Science): Post Graduate/ Graduate with B. Ed and minimum 50% Marks. Nursing Assistant: Qualification according to the CBSE Norms (GNM).

how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for Army Public School Dhrangadhra Various Posts Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Download the application form from the official website: www.apsdhg.com.
Fill the application form carefully with correct information.
Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates.
Check all details carefully before submission.
Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed.
Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 09-08-2026.
Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

content_sections.heading: Army Public School Dhrangadhra Vacancy 2026 Notification PDF
content_sections.text: Candidates who are interested in applying for the Army Public School Dhrangadhra Recruitment 2026 should first download and carefully read the official notification PDF. The notification contains complete details about vacancy distribution, eligibility criteria, age limit, stipend/salary, selection process, important dates, and application instructions. Reading the official document is important to ensure that you meet all requirements before submitting the application form. Download Army Public School Dhrangadhra Job 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: Army Public School Dhrangadhra Selection Process 2026
How to Apply
content_sections.text: Candidates who wish to apply for Army Public School Dhrangadhra Various Posts Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below. Read the official notification carefully before applying. Download the application form from the official website: www.apsdhg.com. Fill the application form carefully with correct information. Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates. Check all details carefully before submission. Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed. Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 09-08-2026. Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

content_sections.heading: Army Public School Dhrangadhra Recruitment 2026 - Important Links

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the Army Public School Dhrangadhra Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the application form for the Army Public School Dhrangadhra Recruitment 2026 is 09 August 2026. Ensure your application reaches the school before this deadline.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available in this recruitment?
faq.answer: There are a total of 2 vacancies announced for the posts of TGT (Science) and Nursing Assistant in the Army Public School Dhrangadhra Recruitment 2026.

faq.question: Q3. What is the application mode for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The application mode for this recruitment is offline. Candidates need to download the application form and send it via post.

faq.question: Q4. What are the educational qualifications required for TGT (Science)?
faq.answer: For the TGT (Science) post, candidates must be Post Graduate/Graduate with B. Ed and a minimum of 50% marks.

faq.question: Q5. What is the qualification for the Nursing Assistant post?
faq.answer: The qualification for the Nursing Assistant post is GNM, according to the CBSE Norms.

faq.question: Q6. What is the application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The application fee for all categories (General/OBC, SC/ST) is Rs. 150/-.

faq.question: Q7. What is the selection process for these posts?
faq.answer: The selection process for the TGT (Science) and Nursing Assistant posts will be based on an Interview.

faq.question: Q8. Where can I download the application form?
faq.answer: The application form can be downloaded from the official website of Army Public School Dhrangadhra, which is www.apsdhg.com.

faq.question: Q9. Is there any age limit mentioned for these posts?
faq.answer: The specific age limit details are not provided in the summary. Candidates are advised to check the official notification for precise age criteria and any applicable relaxations.

faq.question: Q10. What is the job type for these positions?
faq.answer: The job type for these positions is Ad-hoc.

faq.answer: The last date to submit the application form for the Army Public School Dhrangadhra Recruitment 2026 is 09 August 2026. Ensure your application reaches the school before this deadline.
